title: Additional services: LSP manager, remote config fetch, extractMemories worker
description:
Deferred from #511 (framework shipped in 815230c). Each new service is a new file under src/services/ + one Arc<dyn Trait> field on ServiceRegistry.

## Candidates
- **LspManager**: spawn / connect / forward LSP diagnostics to acp.rs IdeState (ties into #517 IDE bridge)
- **RemoteConfig**: fetch Claude Code-style feature-flag bundles (e.g. tengu_* GrowthBook keys) so OC can share rollout signals
- **ExtractMemories worker**: memdir-adjacent — extracts memorable facts from sessions for autoDream (ties into #508)

## References
- /home/doll/claude-code/services/analytics/ (done equivalent)
- /home/doll/claude-code/services/api/
- /home/doll/claude-code/services/extractMemories/
